name: goal-prompt-coach
description: Create ready-to-paste Codex /goal prompts from rough ideas.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into strong Codex /goal prompts.
interface.longDescription: Goal Prompt Coach helps users turn vague or early ideas into auditable, ready-to-paste Codex /goal prompts with assumptions, clarifying questions, verification surfaces, constraints, iteration policy, blocked stop conditions, and final handoff expectations. It does not build the described thing; it only produces the prompt. Its behavior is distilled from the Codex Prompting Guide and Using Goals in Codex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use goal-prompt-coach to create a ready-to-paste Codex /goal prompt from this rough idea:
